stages.name: Normalize
stages.description: Text cleaning + 22 abbreviation expansions + URL/mention stripping

stages.name: Measure
stages.severity_method: Weighted metric combination (customer_density x cross_team, author_gini, no_reply_rate)
stages.type_method: Dominant metric signal (highest computed score wins)

stages.name: Network
stages.method: Communication graph (NetworkX), Louvain communities, centrality analysis

sample_messages: Thanks for sharing, Charlie! @eid_13fdff84 I think the Executive Summary is clear, but it might benefit from a bit more detail on the specific AI technologies used. This could help differentiate us fr

Good point, Emma. Also, in the Market Overview section, it might be helpful to include some recent statistics or trends about the growth of AI in collaboration tools. This could strengthen our argumen
I agree with George. Adding some data could really bolster the Market Overview. Additionally, in the Target Audience section, maybe we could specify more about the size of businesses we're targeting.

The Competitive Analysis is solid, but maybe we could add a bit more about our unique selling proposition. What makes our AI suggestions more contextually relevant than others? This could be a key dif

cross_team_entropy.method: Shannon entropy of product distribution, normalized to [0,1]
cross_team_entropy.interpretation: 1.0 = evenly distributed across all products, 0.0 = single product

source_diversity.method: Unique source types / 4 (slack, transcript, document, PR)

no_reply_rate.method: Fraction of Slack messages with 0 thread replies
no_reply_rate.interpretation: Higher = less engagement / potential communication gap

avg_thread_depth.method: Mean thread reply count for Slack messages in cluster

author_gini.method: Gini coefficient of message authorship distribution

unique_authors.method: Count of distinct user IDs in cluster

customer_density.method: Customer name mentions per document in cluster

customers_referenced.method: Customer names found via relational join with customer master data

temporal_span_days.method: Days between earliest and latest timestamped document

reaction_rate.method: Fraction of messages with emoji reactions
